info.name: Go API - Complete
info.description:
Postman collection for testing all features in Go API Base project.

**Authentication:**
- Public endpoints (register, login, password reset, webhooks) require no auth
- Protected endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}`

**Password Requirements:**
- 8-72 characters
- At least 1 uppercase letter
- At least 1 lowercase letter
- At least 1 number
- At least 1 special character (!@#$%^&*(),.?\":{}|<>)

**Response Format:**
All responses wrapped in `{"data": {...}, "error": {...}, "meta": {...}}`

request.description: Simple health check - returns OK status
Checks database and Redis connectivity

exec: pm.test('Response has user ID and email', function () {

request.description: Register a new user. Password must meet complexity requirements.
Authenticate user and receive access/refresh tokens. Access token expires in 15 minutes, refresh token in 30 days.
Exchange refresh token for new access/refresh tokens. Refresh tokens rotate after use.
Request password reset email. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.
Reset password using token from email. Token is single-use.
Invalidate current session. Requires Bearer token.

exec: pm.test('Response is array of sessions', function () {

request.description: List all active sessions for current user.
Revoke a specific session by ID.
Revoke all sessions except the current one.
Get current authenticated user's profile.
Get authentication metrics (login counts, failure rates, etc.). Requires authentication.
List all users. Requires 'users:manage' permission.
Create a new user. Requires 'users:manage' permission.
Get user details by ID. Requires 'users:manage' permission.
Update a user's profile. Requires 'users:manage' permission.
Soft delete a user. Requires 'users:manage' permission.
Assign a role to a user. Requires 'users:manage' permission.
Remove a role from a user. Requires 'users:manage' permission.
Get all roles assigned to a user.
Grant a direct permission to a user.
Remove a direct permission from a user.
Get all effective permissions for a user (from roles + direct grants).
Create a new role. Requires 'roles:manage' permission.
List all roles with their permissions.
Get a specific role by ID. Requires 'roles:manage' permission.
Update a role. Cannot modify system roles.
Soft delete a role. Cannot delete system roles.
Attach a permission to a role.
Detach a permission from a role.
Create a new permission.
List all permissions.
Create a new organization. Current user becomes the owner.
List organizations where the current user is a member.
Get organization details. User must be a member.
Update organization name, slug, or settings. Requires 'manage' permission.
Soft delete an organization. Requires 'manage' permission.
Add a member to an organization. Role must be 'owner', 'admin', or 'member'.
List members of an organization.
Remove a member from an organization. Requires 'manage' permission.

exec: pm.test('Response has API key data', function () {

request.description: Create a new API key. The secret key is only returned on creation.
List all API keys for the authenticated user.
Get details of a specific API key.
Revoke (soft delete) an API key.
Create a new email template. Category must be one of: transactional, marketing, notification, system.
List all email templates with pagination.
Get a specific email template by ID.
Update an email template by ID. All fields are optional.
Soft delete an email template.
Queue an email for async delivery. Can use template name instead of content.
Get status of a queued email (pending, sent, delivered, failed, bounced).
Process delivery confirmation from SMTP provider. No auth required.
Process delivery confirmation from SendGrid. No auth required.
Process delivery confirmation from Amazon SES. No auth required.
Process bounce notification from SMTP provider. Type can be: hard, soft, spam.
Process bounce notification from SendGrid.
Process bounce/spam complaint from Amazon SES.
List notifications for the authenticated user. Use unread_only=true to filter.
Get count of unread notifications.
Mark a single notification as read.
Mark all unread notifications as read. Optional ?type= filter.
Archive (soft delete) a notification.
Get all notification preferences for the authenticated user.
Create or update a notification preference. Type must be: mention, assignment, system, invoice.created, or news.published.
Upload a media file to a specific model instance. Requires media upload permission.
List all media for a specific model instance.
Get details of a specific media file.
Soft delete a media file. Owner or admin can delete.
Update custom properties/metadata for a media file.
Generate a signed URL for downloading media. Expires in seconds (max 86400).
Download a media file. Public access with signed URL (sig+expires) or authenticated.
List all media files with filtering. Requires 'media:manage' permission.
Trigger cleanup of orphaned media files older than cutoff_hours.
Get storage statistics for all media files. Requires 'media:manage' permission.
Create a new invoice. Requires 'invoices:create' permission.
List invoices for the authenticated user. Requires 'invoices:view' permission.
Get a specific invoice by ID.
Update an invoice. Requires 'invoices:update' permission.
Soft delete an invoice. Requires 'invoices:delete' permission.
